zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Wakebridge於大約1320年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，他的父親Peter de Wakebridge II42歲，母親Joanne De Aslaccon21歲。他於大約1340年與Joan De Aslaccon在英國德比夏爾可利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年在英國德比夏爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾可利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Wakebridge was born about 1320, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Peter de Wakebridge II, was 42 and his mother, Joanne De Aslaccon, was 21. He married Joan De Aslaccon about 1340, in Crich, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1369, in Derbyshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Crich, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Wakebridge est né environ 1320, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter de Wakebridge II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Joanne De Aslaccon, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan De Aslaccon environ 1340, à Crich, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1369, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Crich, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.St Mary's Church, Crich, Derbyshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 크리치 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Wakebridge(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter de Wakebridge II(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanne De Aslaccon(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1340년 영국 더비실르 크리치에서 Joan De Aslaccon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 영국 더비실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 크리치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Wakebridge nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter de Wakebridge II, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Joanne De Aslaccon, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan De Aslaccon aproximadamente 1340, em Crich, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1369, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Crich, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary's Church, Crich, Derbyshire, Eng: ст мэри'с чурч, крич, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Wakebridge родился около 1320 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Peter de Wakebridge II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Joanne De Aslaccon, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan De Aslaccon около 1340 г. в местности крич, дирбишир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1369 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности крич, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Wakebridge nació aproximadamente 1320, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Peter de Wakebridge II, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Joanne De Aslaccon, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joan De Aslaccon aproximadamente 1340, en Crich, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1369, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Crich, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
